A '''sensor globe''' allowed shipboard sensor systems to operate. A [[Rectenna/Legends|sensor dish]] could perform the same tasks, although it had a different exterior appearance.

==Characteristics==
Sensor globes used on top of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]] contained hyperwave transceiver coils and long-range scanners, part of the [[com-scan]] system of the ship.<ref name="ITW:OT" /> The scanners could feed targeting information to the ship's weapons systems, which made them viable targets once the main shields went down in a battle.<ref name="ITW:OT" />

The sensor globes also contained projector vanes for an auxiliary shielding system that had a local-area effect only.<ref name="ITW:OT" /> The vanes were positioned in a crown-like formation around the sensor globes, forming the [[ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome]] system.<ref name="TNEGTWAT" /><ref name="ITW:OT" />
